title: MGN 709 Recommendations for ‘Short range’ yachts, when making passages greater than 90 miles from a safe haven
body: "Notice to all Shipowners, Masters, Managers, Crew, Charterers, Shipbuilders, Project Managers, Employers, Surveyors, Recognised Organisations, Contractors and other providers of shipboard personnel.  This Marine Guidance Note should be read in conjunction with the REG Yacht Code 2024. "
